violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a cutting board and fruit. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use and shall only be used for handwashing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

The door to the outside, located in the rear, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2025
Hot water was not available at handwashing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The door to the outside, located in the rear, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2025
Water pressure at handsink is very low. Adjustment required. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
